promotable_facts.fact: Financial covenant compliance waived for Dec 31, 2024 and June 30, 2025 test dates
1L Term Loan interest rate increased to SOFR + 5.25% starting Jan 1, 2025
Long-lived asset impairments breakdown: $14.0M underperforming stores + $9.1M Rite Aid intangible
Capitalized software impairment: $28.0M for 5 terminated technology projects
Vendor allowances (rebates): $43.5M in 2024 retained by franchisor as COGS reduction
Advertising expense: $66.8M (2024) — vs. $21.7M royalties + $13.5M co-op from franchisees
PRO Access paid membership program with virtual healthcare and prescriptions
Q2 2025: Entered CNY 1.5B revolving loan with Bank of East Asia for working capital
Arbitration award of $44.7M + $8.7M fees against Singapore/Philippines partner — contingent gain not recognized
State addenda: 30 structured overrides across 12 states identified and extracted
Washington state fee impound: initial franchise fees deferred until pre-opening obligations met and store is open
Minnesota: 90 days termination notice + 60 days cure + 180 days non-renewal notice
